title: Jungle Treehouse Village
description: Adds a big jungle treehouse village to the game
body:
**This mod adds a large treehouse village to all jungle biomes, featuring villagers of every profession.**

![Treehouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f9b31bf7f2e491cb1e12dde0140976b4a5ca825.jpeg)
**Explore the structure to discover hidden chests, valuable loot, and a beautifully decorated interior.**
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a2a2ace523628aedca77f836010259527dd6fb7.jpeg)
Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
